---
title: "Converting Agewell Codesheet to Long Format including All Correlations and Timelags"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r setup, include=TRUE}

# Load Libraries and Read Data

library(openxlsx)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)

# Define file paths
file_path <- "data/included_studies_1-13.xlsx" 
output_path <- "output/long_format_with_all_corr.xlsx"

# Read Excel data starting from row 2 (headers start here)
data <- read.xlsx(file_path, startRow = 2)

# Clean column names to remove unwanted characters and whitespace
clean_names <- function(x) {
  x <- gsub('["\']', "", x)             # remove quotes
  x <- gsub("&#10;?", "", x)             # remove HTML newline
  x <- gsub("[\r\n]", "", x)            # remove actual newlines
  x <- trimws(x)                          # trim edges
  x <- gsub("\\s+", "", x)              # remove inner whitespace
  return(x)
}
names(data) <- clean_names(names(data))
```

```{r define-columns}

# Define and Set Column Order Dynamically by Pattern

# Static columns to keep
keep_static <- c("0_IDF", "1_ID", "1.1_CaseID", "2_Author", "3_Year", "29_WbPoint")

# Extract and sort numeric index from column name for t1 to t12
extract_index <- function(col) {
  idx <- as.numeric(str_extract(col, "(?<=WB(mt|sdt))\\d+"))
  ifelse(is.na(idx), Inf, idx)
}

# Collect and order WBmt and WBsdt interleaved
wbmt <- grep("_WBmt\\d+$", names(data), value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)
wbsdt <- grep("_WBsdt\\d+$", names(data), value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)
wbmt <- wbmt[order(extract_index(wbmt))]
wbsdt <- wbsdt[order(extract_index(wbsdt))]
ordered_mt_sdt <- c(rbind(wbmt, wbsdt))

# Collect all WBt and WBcort pairs in tX-tY order
extract_pair_index <- function(col) {
  parts <- str_match(col, "t(\\d+)t(\\d+)")[,2:3]
  if (any(is.na(parts))) return(Inf)
  as.numeric(parts[1]) * 100 + as.numeric(parts[2])
}

wbt <- grep("_WBt\\d+t\\d+$", names(data), value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)
wbcort <- grep("_WBcort\\d+t\\d+$", names(data), value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)
wbt <- wbt[order(sapply(wbt, extract_pair_index))]
wbcort <- wbcort[order(sapply(wbcort, extract_pair_index))]

# Final custom column order
custom_columns <- c(ordered_mt_sdt, wbt, wbcort)

# Add interval and combine
timepoints <- 1:11
intervals <- paste0(timepoints, "-", timepoints + 1)
data$interval <- NA
final_col_order <- c(keep_static, "interval", custom_columns)
```


```{r reorder columns}

# Reorder and Subset Columns

# Ensure all specified columns exist in dataset
available_cols <- intersect(final_col_order, names(data))
data <- data[, available_cols, drop = FALSE]
```


```{r reshape-intervals}

# Convert to Long Format by Interval Logic (Preserving All Columns)

# Predefine expected WBmt and WBsdt column names
all_wbmt_cols <- paste0("_WBmt", 1:12)
all_wbsdt_cols <- paste0("_WBsdt", 1:12)
timepoints <- 1:11
intervals <- paste0(timepoints, "-", timepoints + 1)
long_rows <- list()

# Loop over each case/row
for (i in 1:nrow(data)) {
  static_info <- data[i, keep_static]
  base_row <- data[i, ]

  for (tp in timepoints) {
    interval_label <- paste0(tp, "-", tp + 1)

    row <- base_row
    row$interval <- interval_label

    long_rows[[length(long_rows) + 1]] <- row
  }
}
```


```{r}
long_format <- bind_rows(long_rows)
long_format[long_format == ""] <- NA    # Replace empty strings with NA
```

```{r export}

# Export to Excel
long_format <- bind_rows(long_rows)
write.xlsx(long_format[, final_col_order], output_path, rowNames = FALSE)
cat("File saved with all correlation columns in exact order.\n")
```
